'''zodashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:wadjela|wadjela]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-d-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wadjela|wadjela]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zodashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodashithi|zodashithi]] || [[word:zodashiji|zodashiji]] || [[word:zodashishi|zodashishi]] || [[word:zodashiki|zodashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodashuthuthu|zodashuthuthu]] || [[word:zodashujuju|zodashujuju]] || [[word:zodashushushu|zodashushushu]] || [[word:zodashukuku|zodashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodashuthu|zodashuthu]] || [[word:zodashuju|zodashuju]] || [[word:zodashushu|zodashushu]] || [[word:zodashuku|zodashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodashufthuf|zodashufthuf]] || [[word:zodashufjuf|zodashufjuf]] || [[word:zodashufshuf|zodashufshuf]] || [[word:zodashufkuf|zodashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodashethe|zodashethe]] || [[word:zodasheje|zodasheje]] || [[word:zodasheshe|zodasheshe]] || [[word:zodasheke|zodasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodashothotho|zodashothotho]] || [[word:zodashojojo|zodashojojo]] || [[word:zodashoshosho|zodashoshosho]] || [[word:zodashokoko|zodashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodashotho|zodashotho]] || [[word:zodashojo|zodashojo]] || [[word:zodashosho|zodashosho]] || [[word:zodashoko|zodashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodashofthof|zodashofthof]] || [[word:zodashofjof|zodashofjof]] || [[word:zodashofshof|zodashofshof]] || [[word:zodashofkof|zodashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfthĂŻf|zodashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfjĂŻf|zodashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfshĂŻf|zodashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfkĂŻf|zodashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zodashĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zodashĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zodashĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zodashĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfthĂŻf|zodashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfjĂŻf|zodashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfshĂŻf|zodashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfkĂŻf|zodashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfthĂŻf|zodashĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfjĂŻf|zodashĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfshĂŻf|zodashĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zodashĂŻfkĂŻf|zodashĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zodashĂŠthĂŠ|zodashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zodashĂŠjĂŠ|zodashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zodashĂŠshĂŠ|zodashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zodashĂŠkĂŠ|zodashĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zodashathatha|zodashathatha]] || [[word:zodashajaja|zodashajaja]] || [[word:zodashashasha|zodashashasha]] || [[word:zodashakaka|zodashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zodashatha|zodashatha]] || [[word:zodashaja|zodashaja]] || [[word:zodashasha|zodashasha]] || [[word:zodashaka|zodashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zodashafthaf|zodashafthaf]] || [[word:zodashafjaf|zodashafjaf]] || [[word:zodashafshaf|zodashafshaf]] || [[word:zodashafkaf|zodashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zodashasha|zodashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodashĂ«sha|zodashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodashrosha|zodashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodashmusha|zodashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodashyasha|zodashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodashnkshĂ«sha|gozodashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodashnkrosha|gozodashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodashnkmusha|gozodashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodashnkyasha|gozodashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zodadashasha|zodadashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodadashĂ«sha|zodadashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodadashrosha|zodadashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodadashmusha|zodadashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodadashyasha|zodadashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodadashnkshĂ«sha|gozodadashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodadashnkrosha|gozodadashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodadashnkmusha|gozodadashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodadashnkyasha|gozodadashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zedĂŠshasha|zedĂŠshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zedĂŠshĂ«sha|zedĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zedĂŠshrosha|zedĂŠshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zedĂŠshmusha|zedĂŠshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zedĂŠshyasha|zedĂŠshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozedĂŠshnkshĂ«sha|gozedĂŠshnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozedĂŠshnkrosha|gozedĂŠshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozedĂŠshnkmusha|gozedĂŠshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozedĂŠshnkyasha|gozedĂŠshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zodfashasha|zodfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zodfashĂ«sha|zodfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zodfashrosha|zodfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zodfashmusha|zodfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zodfashyasha|zodfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozodfashnkshĂ«sha|gozodfashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozodfashnkrosha|gozodfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozodfashnkmusha|gozodfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozodfashnkyasha|gozodfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
